🔍 The Origin Story
🤯
// FOUNDER.EXE — STATUS: INSPIRED
👑 OneCoin raises $4 billion — no blockchain existed. Founder still missing.
📢 BitConnect steals $3.45B with a "trading bot." Bot did not trade.
🎩 Centra Tech raises $25M with fake Visa deals + Floyd Mayweather's face.
🦑 Squid Game Token pumps 23,000,000%. Investors couldn't sell. Coded that way.
🇦🇷 $LIBRA — Argentina's president tweeted it. Hit $4B. Collapsed in hours. $250M gone.

🌾 MetaYield Farm — $290M drained in Feb 2025. 14,000+ users. Team: vanished.
🙋‍♂️ Me: "I ALSO WANT $40,000"
How I Cracked the Code

It started innocently. I was just a person on the internet watching project after project raise millions — sometimes billions — for things that ranged from questionable to outright criminal.

👑 OneCoin raised up to $15 billion dollars. It had no blockchain. Not a broken blockchain — no blockchain at all. The founder, Ruja Ignatova, called the "Cryptoqueen," disappeared in 2017 and is currently on the FBI's Ten Most Wanted list. The money is also gone.

Then there was BitConnect — a "lending platform" that promised 40% monthly returns powered by a proprietary trading bot. The bot did not trade. It was a Ponzi scheme. It collapsed in 2018, taking $3.45 billion with it. It also produced the most memed moment in crypto history — a man on stage screaming "BIIITCOOONNEEECT" into a microphone at a conference full of people about to lose everything.

🎩 Centra Tech raised $25 million claiming partnerships with Visa and Mastercard. Neither Visa nor Mastercard had heard of them. Celebrity endorsers Floyd Mayweather and DJ Khaled were later fined by the SEC. The founders were arrested.

In 2021, Squid Game Token rode the viral Netflix show to a 23,000,000% price pump. Investors who tried to sell discovered the smart contract had been coded to block all selling — only the developers could exit. They did. Price went to zero. A Twitch streamer caught it live on camera.

Then 2025 happened. Argentina's president Javier Milei tweeted about a coin called $LIBRA, saying it would fund small businesses. It hit a $4 billion market cap in minutes. Insiders drained $107 million in liquidity within hours. $250 million in retail losses followed. Milei deleted the tweet. An Argentine congressional commission later concluded the episode was "compatible with alleged fraud." The investigation is ongoing.

🇺🇸 $TRUMP and $MELANIA launched in January 2025, days before inauguration. Combined retail losses: ~$4.3 billion across roughly 800,000 investors. The same firm that handled $MELANIA's launch also handled $LIBRA. Both coins still have verified Twitter accounts.

And in February 2025, MetaYield Farm — a DeFi yield project — drained $290 million from over 14,000 users before vanishing completely. No arrests. No refunds. No website. Just 14,000 people refreshing a dead URL.

So I thought: if this is the bar — I too deserve a fundraiser. Not for billions. Not even for millions. A humble, transparent $40,000 — the price of one Toyota Camry — from 8,000 people who found this funny enough to donate $5. At least I'm telling you upfront that there is no product.

Ladies and gentlemen — I present $ZEROTH. Layer -1. One level below zero. We are not solving a problem. We are not creating one either. We are simply here.

🗺️ Roadmap
The Master Plan
Ambitious. Detailed. Subject to change based on mood, weather, and GTA Online server availability.
🚀
Q2 2026 — NOW
The Raise
Raise $40,000. Post celebration tweet. Change bio to "Founder @ZerothProtocol." Begin wearing hoodies exclusively. Call myself a "builder."
🤫
Q3 2026
Building in Silence
Actively playing GTA. Tweet "big things cooking 🔥" at 1am every two weeks. Whitepaper gets a new font. Team photo updated (same photo, better filter).
💻
Q4 2026
Testnet Launch
Testnet crashes in 4 minutes. Community: "battle-tested." We call it "successful stress test phase." Roadmap pushed to Q1 2027.
📉
Q1 2027
Market Conditions
Blame market conditions for everything. Post "bear market survival guide." Price: $0.00004. "We're accumulating, anon." Vibes: immaculate.
👀
Q2 2027
V2 Announcement
"V2 changes everything." Attach Figma mockup — a rectangle with "$ZEROTH V2" in bold. Community: "LFG!!!" 🚀🚀🚀

Q4 2027
V2 Status Update
V2 is not coming. "Pivoting to the core primitive." Nobody asks what the core primitive is. This is intentional.
🤖
2028
The AI Pivot
Announce $ZEROTH AI. Add "AI" to website. Raise another $40,000. Full circle. The ecosystem is now complete. We have built nothing, twice.
